Selected work, 2021–2026

ACTIB

A volleyball training glove with real-time haptic feedback for setters.

ALL-INK

A refillable ink cartridge ecosystem that makes sustainable printing effortless.

HIVE-FU

An autonomous medical ultrasound system designed for deep-space missions.

Mario's Garden

A sensor-driven plant care game that teaches children empathy for nature.

Nest Assured

A plug-and-play RFID tracker designed for young adults with ADHD.

URSA

A guidance and communication glove that keeps urban cyclists safer.

A systems-level analysis of desalination technology as a response to global water stress.
